agents.name: Job Discovery Agent
agents.tip: Deterministic multi-source discovery (Seek, Greenhouse, Lever, Remotive, RemoteOK) — scrapes and normalises listings with no LLM cost.

agents.name: Resume Tailoring Agent
agents.tip: Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for nuanced writing and format preservation. GPT-4o is a good alternative for speed. Avoid smaller models.

agents.name: Cover Letter Agent
agents.tip: Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 or GPT-4o. Needs strong creative writing and tone adaptation capabilities.

agents.name: ATS Optimization Agent
agents.tip: The semantic ATS engine that runs inside Match Scoring — embeds each resume against the job description (deterministic, no chat cost). Already shipped; runs as part of fit scoring.

agents.name: Compliance Agent
agents.tip: Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for careful reasoning about truthfulness and evidence verification.

agents.name: Submission Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o for reliable form-filling and browser automation reasoning.

agents.name: Match Scoring Agent
agents.tip: Deterministic 10-dimension fit scoring + ATS keyword/semantic engine — scores every discovered job with no LLM cost.

agents.name: Job Matching Agent
agents.tip: Ranks every fit-scored job and selects the best-fit target for tailoring — the matcher node of the live pipeline, now runnable on its own. Deterministic, no LLM cost.

agents.name: Salary Intelligence Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o-mini — aggregates salary data at scale affordably.

agents.name: Interview Prep Agent
agents.tip: Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4 for realistic mock interviews and deep reasoning.

agents.name: Company Research Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o for synthesizing company research from web sources.

agents.name: Skill Gap Agent
agents.tip: Surfaces the job's missing keywords from the ATS engine (ATSScore.missing_keywords) — the skill-gap facet of Match Scoring. Already shipped; deterministic, no LLM cost.

agents.name: Recruiter Outreach Agent
agents.tip: Planned: first-touch outbound to a recruiter/contact with no existing thread (a future dedicated OutreachAgent). Inbox triage and reply/follow-up drafting already live in the Email Agent.

agents.name: Email Agent
agents.tip: Real Gmail-backed inbox triage, evidence-grounded reply and follow-up drafting, label management and per-thread insights. Sends are approval-gated. Best with Claude claude-sonnet-4. Connect Gmail (Email Center) to activate live send/sync.

agents.name: Market Trends Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o — synthesizes market & hiring trend signals.

agents.name: Scheduling Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o-mini — lightweight scheduling & calendar coordination.

agents.name: Sentiment Analysis Agent
agents.tip: Best with claude-3.5-haiku for tone & sentiment scoring of replies.

agents.name: Reference Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o-mini — manages reference requests & reminders.

agents.name: Story Extraction Agent
agents.tip: Mines the base resume into STAR+R evidence stories for the Story Bank — runs on the STRUCTURED model tier.

agents.name: Learning / Feedback Agent
agents.tip: Planned: learns from application outcomes to refine future tailoring.

agents.name: Orchestration Agent
agents.tip: Plans and sequences the live pipeline (supervisor node): scout → fitScorer → matcher → tailor → coverLetter. Deterministic, no LLM cost.

agents.name: Notification Agent
agents.tip: Best with GPT-4o-mini — monitors status changes and pushes timely alerts.
